data.body:
Goal:
For a tool whose pitch is "trust me with your prod secrets," the auditor's
first read is "what changed and why." Adopt Keep-a-Changelog and Semantic
Versioning conventions explicitly.

Verification:
1. `CHANGELOG.md` exists with `[Unreleased]` and a backfilled `[0.1.0]` entry capturing the current state.
2. README's install snippet pins to a real tag (see K-11).
3. Future release workflow (K-40, K-48) generates entries from PR titles or conventional-commits scopes.

Constraints:
- Knot ref: K-08; wave/step 1.4; effort S; risk low
- Files: CHANGELOG.md (new)
- Notes: Don't try to backfill history in detail — the repo only has 2 commits. A
single "initial release" bullet under 0.1.0 is fine.
data.title: Add CHANGELOG.md (Keep-a-Changelog)
